source: #### Setup Config Parameters

from pyspark.sql import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, row_number, when, sha2, concat_ws

# Environment Parameter
env = 'prod'

# Config for updating keys in Bronze
fuel_override_config = [
    {   
        "table_detail": "override_bronze.fuel_override",
        "table_detail_bkup": "override_bronze.fuel_override_bkup",
        "table_name": "fuel_override",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/override_bronze/fuel_override",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/override_bronze/fuel_override_bkp",
        "format": "delta"
    }
]

electricity_override_config = [
    {   
        "table_detail": "override_bronze.electricity_override",
        "table_detail_bkup": "override_bronze.electricity_override_bkup",
        "table_name": "electricity_override",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/override_bronze/electricity_override",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/override_bronze/electricity_override_bkp",
        "format": "delta"
    }
]

# Config for Silver Backup
silver_tables_config = [
    {
        "table_detail": "silver.fuel_transactions",
        "table_detail_bkup": "silver.fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "table_name": "fuel_transactions",
        "path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions/fuel_transactions",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions_bkup/fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "format": "delta"
    },
    {
        "table_detail": "silver.retail_electricity_charge_details",
        "table_detail_bkup": "silver.retail_electricity_charge_details_bkup",
        "table_name": "retail_electricity_charge_details",
        "path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/retail_electricity_charge_details/retail_electricity_charge_details",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/retail_electricity_charge_details_bkup/retail_electricity_charge_details_bkup",
        "format": "delta"
    }
#### Create Backup Tables (Frozen Cells)

#Create backups (fuel_override)
for config in fuel_override_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")

#Create backups (electricity_override)
for config in electricity_override_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")

#Create backups (silver)
for config in silver_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")
#### Restore From Backup Tables (Frozen Cells)

#Restore backups (fuel_override)
for config in fuel_override_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")

#Restore backups (electricity_override)
for config in electricity_override_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")

#Restore backups (silver)
for config in silver_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")
#### Validation Queries - Before Updates

# electricity_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT count(1) FROM override_bronze.electricity_override
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# electricity_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT 
    Id,
    InvoiceNumber, 
    PreviousReadDate, 
    CurrentReadDate,  
    QuantityKWH,
    CleanEnergySubscription,
    Supplier,
    CDCLoadDate,
    CDCOps,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM 
    override_bronze.electricity_override
where 
    invoicenumber = '88168405'
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

#Silver Validation retail_electricity_charge_details
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    BillingPeriodStartDate,
    BillingPeriodEndDate,
    BillingPeriodDays,
    BillingPeriodQuantityKwh,
    MonthlyBillingPeriod,
    MonthlyBillingDays,
    MonthlyBillingQuantityKwh,
    CleanEnergySubscription,
    FileRowIndex,
    RecordSourceTableName,
    CDCLoadDate,
    CDCOps,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM 
    silver.retail_electricity_charge_details
where 
    invoicenumber = '88168405'
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# fuel_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT count(1) FROM override_bronze.fuel_override
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# fuel_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT * FROM override_bronze.fuel_override
WHERE TransactionNumber in
(SELECT distinct TransactionNumber FROM override_bronze.fuel_override
group by TransactionNumber, transactiondate
having count(1) > 1
)
order by TransactionNumber, transactiondate
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)
#### Perform Table Updates - electricity_override

# Update electricity_override
# START
for config in electricity_override_config:

    df = spark.read.format(config["format"]).load(config["path"])
    filtered_df = df.filter((df["Id"].isin("18","19")) & (df["InvoiceNumber"]=="88168405"))
    result_df = df.exceptAll(filtered_df)
    #display(result_df)

    
    result_df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema", "true").save(config["path"])
    print(f"Overwrite complete")

# END
#### Perform Table Updates - fuel_override

# Update fuel_override
# START
for config in fuel_override_config:

    df = spark.read.format(config["format"]).load(config["path"])

    filtered_df_01349024 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("3/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01349024"))
    result_df = df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01349024) 
    
    filtered_df_01349680 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("3/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01349680"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01349680)

    filtered_df_01349684 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("3/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01349684"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01349684)

    filtered_df_01349965 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("4/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01349965"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01349965)
    
    filtered_df_01350227 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("4/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01350227"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01350227)
    
    filtered_df_01350293 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("5/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01350293"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01350293)

    filtered_df_01350298 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("5/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01350298"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01350298)
        
    filtered_df_01351086 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("6/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01351086"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01351086)

    filtered_df_01351416 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("6/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01351416"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01351416)
    
    filtered_df_01351417 = df.filter((df["TransactionDate"]==("6/06/2025")) & (df["TransactionNumber"]=="01351417"))
    result_df = result_df.exceptAll(filtered_df_01351417)

    #result_df = result_df.dropna()
    #display(result_df)
    
    result_df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema", "true").save(config["path"])
    print(f"Overwrite complete")

# END
#### Drop Silver Tables

file_path = f'abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions/fuel_transactions'
mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True) 
mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE silver.fuel_transactions;""")

file_path = f'abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/retail_electricity_charge_details/retail_electricity_charge_details'
mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE silver.retail_electricity_charge_details;""")
#### Drop Gold Tables

#file_path = f'abfss://gold@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fact_fuel_consumption/fact_fuel_consumption'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
#mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE gold.fact_fuel_consumption;""")

#file_path = f'abfss://gold@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fact_retail_electricity_consumption/fact_retail_electricity_consumption'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
#mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE gold.fact_retail_electricity_consumption;""")
#### Validation Queries - After Updates

# electricity_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT count(1) FROM override_bronze.electricity_override
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# electricity_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT 
    InvoiceNumber, 
    PreviousReadDate, 
    CurrentReadDate,  
    QuantityKWH,
    CleanEnergySubscription,
    Supplier,
    CDCLoadDate,
    CDCOps,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM 
    override_bronze.electricity_override
where 
    invoicenumber = '88168405'
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

#Silver Validation retail_electricity_charge_details 
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    BillingPeriodStartDate,
    BillingPeriodEndDate,
    BillingPeriodDays,
    BillingPeriodQuantityKwh,
    MonthlyBillingPeriod,
    MonthlyBillingDays,
    MonthlyBillingQuantityKwh,
    CleanEnergySubscription,
    FileRowIndex,
    RecordSourceTableName,
    CDCLoadDate,
    CDCOps,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM 
    silver.retail_electricity_charge_details
where 
    invoicenumber = '88168405'
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# fuel_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT count(1) FROM override_bronze.fuel_override
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# fuel_override Validation
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT * FROM override_bronze.fuel_override
WHERE TransactionNumber in
(SELECT distinct TransactionNumber FROM override_bronze.fuel_override
group by TransactionNumber, transactiondate
having count(1) > 1
)
order by TransactionNumber, transactiondate
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)
